ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker delivering the event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university or institution hosting the event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the event (e.g., lecture, seminar, workshop) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the event (number of attendees) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is open to the public */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Promotion status of the event (e.g., not promoted, promoted, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES venues ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's professional website */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the speaker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* List of the speaker's areas of expertise */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the speaker's profile picture */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the speaker's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university or institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university or institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the university or institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the university or institution */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the university's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the university's official website */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or faculty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor of the venue */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of attendees) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the venue is accessible (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available in the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration_range" TEXT /* Typical duration range for events of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the attendee (e.g., student, professor, external) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., participant, organizer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the attendee's profile picture */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of the attendee's areas of interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendee was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendee's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee is registered for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "confirmation_code" TEXT /* Unique confirmation code for the registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the feedback is for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional feedback provided by the attendee */,
  "rating_justification" TEXT /* Justification for the rating provided by the attendee */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia resource */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the resource (e.g., video, slides, handout) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the resource in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the thumbnail image of the resource */,
  "is_downloadable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource can be downloaded */,
  "access_code" TEXT /* Unique access code for the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the icon representing the resource type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource type's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, attendee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
